title: inference.put_googleaistudio

task_type.description: The type of the inference task that the model will perform.

googleaistudio_inference_id.description: The unique identifier of the inference endpoint.

timeout.description: Specifies the amount of time to wait for the inference endpoint to be created.

chunking_settings.description:
The chunking configuration object.
Applies only to the `text_embedding` task type.
Not applicable to the `completion` task type.

service.description: The type of service supported for the specified task type. In this case, `googleaistudio`.

service_settings.description: Settings used to install the inference model. These settings are specific to the `googleaistudio` service.

description:
Create an Google AI Studio inference endpoint.

Create an inference endpoint to perform an inference task with the `googleaistudio` service.
